title: Iran Strikes US Embassy In Baghdad After Trump Targets Kharg Island | 10 News

title: Chicago River Dyed Emerald Green Ahead Of St Patrick's Celebrations | 10 News
description: Chicago has been turned green! 💚  Plumbers in the city have transformed the Chicago River into an bright emerald green ahead of one of the year’s biggest days of festivities.  Thousands of litres of special green dye were poured into the waterway to mark St Patrick’s Day, with the colour able to last anywhere from a few hours to several days depending on the weather.  Tens of thousands of people are expected to pack the city’s Irish bars for a day of celebrations on March 17, which will also feature a rubber duck race. title: Protests Erupt In Morón As Cubans Attack Communist Party Office | 10 News
description: The Cuban government is threatening a security crackdown after protesters attacked and burned a communist party building in the central city of Moron.  Moments later gunfire broke out, and several people were reportedly shot Cuban state media later denied that announcing five arrests.  Cuba is struggling with a growing energy crisis after America cut off its only supply line of fuel from Venezuela food and medicine are also facing dire shortages.
